title: pteris aquilina f. lanuginosa
intro: Pteris aquilina f. lanuginosa, also known as the ferny or woolly bracken, is a variant of the Pteris aquilina species, a type of flowering plant in the family Pteridaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Pteris aquilina f. lanuginosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an antioxidant, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Pteris aquilina f. lanuginosa can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
